title: reel:update-shot args
description: Patch one storyboard shot's timeline properties: playback speed (变速/定格), in/out timing, entrance transition (转场) and clip in/out animation (首尾动画). Only the fields you provide are changed. Call reel:get-scene-timeline first for the shotId. The workbench reloads within seconds (data persists regardless).

speed.description: Playback speed. 1=normal, 0=freeze frame (画面定格), 0.5..2 typical slow/fast. Affects <video>.playbackRate.

startMs.description: Shot start on the scene timeline (ms).

endMs.description: Shot end on the scene timeline (ms). Must be > startMs.

transitionIn.description: Entrance transition into this shot (剪映式两段视频衔接). Pass null to clear.

clipAnim.description: In/out animation for this shot (首尾动画, 默认黑底渐显渐隐). Pass null to clear.
